title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AFL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
